_comment: Edit this to define YOUR niche. 'searches' = nitter search queries (use min_faves:N to bias toward viral posts; -term excludes). 'accounts' = peer/competitor handles to study. 'requireAny' = post text must contain >=1 of these (niche guard). 'exclude' = drop if text contains any. 'minEngagement' = drop below this max-stat threshold.
